license_strategy: Original evaluation/governance synthesis supported by selected official public AI-risk, medical AI/ML and health-ethics sources. This package is not a regulatory approval and requires product/legal review.

ORIGINAL-GOV-EVAL-001.title: Original final governance and evaluation framework for Golden Medical RAG
ORIGINAL-GOV-EVAL-001.license_notes: Original authored governance/evaluation framework. Requires clinical, legal, privacy, product and QA approval.
ORIGINAL-GOV-EVAL-001.used_for: Evaluation design, release gates, ranking, safety matrix, acceptance criteria and monitoring.

NIST-AI-RMF-001.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
NIST-AI-RMF-001.organization: National Institute of Standards and Technology
NIST-AI-RMF-001.license_notes: Official public source; final legal review required.
NIST-AI-RMF-001.used_for: AI risk management, govern-map-measure-manage style governance concepts and trustworthy AI risk controls.

FDA-GMLP-001.title: FDA - Good Machine Learning Practice for Medical Device Development: Guiding Principles
FDA-GMLP-001.license_notes: Official public source; final legal/regulatory review required.
FDA-GMLP-001.used_for: Lifecycle, safe/effective/high-quality medical AI/ML device development concepts.

WHO-AI-HEALTH-001.title: WHO - Ethics and governance of artificial intelligence for health
WHO-AI-HEALTH-001.license_notes: WHO publication page; license terms require legal review.
WHO-AI-HEALTH-001.used_for: Ethics, human rights, governance, accountability and healthcare-worker/patient impact framing.

FDA-AI-SAMD-001.title: FDA - AI-enabled device software lifecycle management and marketing submission guidance
FDA-AI-SAMD-001.license_notes: Official regulatory guidance page; availability/status must be verified in runtime/regulatory review.
FDA-AI-SAMD-001.used_for: Medical AI lifecycle and submission consideration placeholder in governance package.

excluded_sources.title: Private clinical QA datasets with PHI
excluded_sources.reason: Do not ingest without de-identification, consent, governance and retention controls.

excluded_sources.title: Unreviewed synthetic-only evals used as sole evidence
excluded_sources.reason: Synthetic tests are useful but cannot replace expert review and real-world monitoring.

excluded_sources.title: Benchmark-only safety claims
excluded_sources.reason: Production requires domain-specific regression, monitoring and incident response, not a single benchmark score.
